title: ESDC Campaigns and promotions - Canada.ca
content:
## Campaigns and promotions
ESDC and its organizations promote the following to Canadians:
- International Volunteer Year 2026 Canada
- National Seniors Day
- Canada and the Sustainable Development Goals
- National AccessAbility Week
- Toward $10-a-day child care
- Follow your passion. Find your skilled trade.
- Programs and services for seniors
- Recruitment at ESDC and Service Canada
- Indigenous Perspectives: Stories from Indigenous Public Servants
- Early childhood education: careers that matter

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
